name: Angkhan Khlumpong The Series
original_name: อังคารคลุมโปงเดอะซีรีส์
overview: From a popular radio program of EFM94 to a haunting series of 8 horror stories. Mysterious audiences call to tell their spooky tale to DJ Moddam Kachapa, the host of the program.

trailers.title: อังคารคลุมโปง The Series [Official TRAILER]
